text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Huge crowds gather on the day of the Hopeful
Stakes, a G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket takes on the challenge with
everything she has, viewing this as an opportunity
to get used to longer races in preparation for the
Japanese Derby.
